page_metadata.biotools__summary: Allows a user to do quantitative protein-level statistical inference on label-free LC-MS proteomics data. Fold changes, p values and false discovery rates are estimated.The app allows for an easy-to-use graphical user interface starting from MaxQuant search results that requires no programming skills.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Allows a user to do quantitative protein-level statistical inference on label-free LC-MS proteomics data. Fold changes, p values and false discovery rates are estimated.The app allows for an easy-to-use graphical user interface starting from MaxQuant search results that requires no programming skills.
